prompt: Implement the unsigned fixed-width saturating counter in saturating_counter.h. SaturatingCounter<Bits> must support Bits from 1 through 16, clamp constructor values to [0, 2^Bits-1], expose value(), is_min(), and is_max(), and implement prefix/postfix ++ and -- plus += and -= for signed integer deltas. Every operation must saturate without unsigned wraparound. Keep this as a header-only C++20 implementation.
instruction: Complete saturating_counter.h and preserve its public API.
